text: Comparables #1, #3, and #4 are found in close proxmity to the subject property in Normal, IL. Due to a lack of recent comparable sales, Comparables #2, #3, and #4 are found in competing neighborhoods. Comparable #1 is the conjoining attached townhouse to the subject. It has not received any adjustments due to its similar design, condition, and quality. Comparable #2 has been included to bracket the subject's GLA and demonstrates the marketability of newly constructed attached homes in the market area. It has been adjusted for its site size, superior quality, lack of a second garage space, and fireplace. Comparables #3 & #4 are older sales, but have not been applied with a market time adjustment due to their sale price reflecting the current market. Comparable #3 has been included to demonstrate the marketability of newly constructed attached homes in the market area. It has been adjusted for its superior quality, lack of an above grade half bathroom, GLA, finished basement room count, lack of a patio, and fireplace. Comparable #4 has been included to demonstrate the marketability of newly constructed attached homes in the market area. It has been adjusted for its location on Raab Rd, superior quality, lack of an above grade half bathroom, GLA, finished basement room count, lack of a patio, and fireplace. Most weight has been applied to Comparable #1 due to its similar design, condition, and quality to the subject. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

Due to a lack of recent comparable sales in Danvers, IL, all comparables have been found in the Bloomington-Normal area. Danvers is a bedroom community of Bloomington-Normal and most residents commute for employment. The commute to Bloomington-Normal does not deter the market segment of potential buyers for the subject property, and allows for similar properties in Bloomington-Normal to be considered comparable. The subject property is of a significantly higher quality and design when compared to other properties in Danvers. All comparables have been given a location adjustment due to the ammenities Bloomington-Normal has to offer. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its age, GLA, lack of a walk-up attic, lack of a patio, and lack of a fireplace. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, GLA, basement finished room count, and walk-up attic finish. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, age, second full bathroom, basement room count, lack of a walk-up attic, attached garage, lack of a patio, and lack of a fence. See Comparable #4, #5 & #6.  06/07/2024 Appraiser to address the following red flags on SSR report: 1) The gross living area for the subject property (2492 sf) varies by more than 10% from public records (1331 sf) please confirm GLA is accurate. 2) The bedroom count for the subject property (4) varies from the public record value of (7) please confirm bedroom count is accurate.  McLean County Assessor lists the Total Base Area as: 1,331 sf. The assessor has only included the  first floor square footage.  MRED/MLS #12050028 supports the bedroom count of 4 and further supports the gross living area of 2492 sf. The appraiser has adhered to ANSI standards in measuring and inspecting the subject property.

All comparables are found in close proximity to the subject property in Le Roy, IL. Due to a lack of recent sales, Comparables #1, #2, and #4 are older sales and are included to demonstrate the stability of the market in Le Roy, IL. They have not been applied with a market time adjustment. Comparable #1 was built in the 1960's, but has been included to demonstrate the marketability of similar designed houses in Le Roy. It has been adjusted for its site size, view, age, GLA, central air, and garage space count. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, view, half bathroom, GLA, basement, and central air. Comparables #3 and #4 have been included to demonstrate the marketability of similar designed houses that are located next to commerical businesses similar to the subject. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, superior condition due to recent remodeling, garage space count, central air, and lack of a second covered porch.  See Comparable #4. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

All comparables are found in close proximity to the subject property in Le Roy, IL. Due to a lack of recent sales, Comparables #1, #2, and #4 are older sales and are included to demonstrate the stability of the market in Le Roy, IL. They have not been applied with a market time adjustment. Due to a lack of recent sales, the subject's sale price is not bracketed. A search was made for comparable properties to bracket the subject's sale price, but none were found. Comparable #1 was built in the 1960's, but has been included to demonstrate the marketability of similar designed houses in Le Roy. It has been adjusted for its site size, view, age, GLA, central air, and garage space count. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, view, half bathroom, GLA, basement, and central air. Comparables #3 and #4 have been included to demonstrate the marketability of similar designed houses that are located next to commerical businesses similar to the subject. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, superior condition due to recent remodeling, garage space count, central air, and lack of a second covered porch.  See Comparable #4. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

All comparables have been found in competing rural areas of McLean County. The comparables include older sales, but have not been given a market time adjustment as they still provide an accurate market value. Comparable #1 has been included to demonstrate the marketability of a newly constructed house in a rural area with a similar design, quality, and condition to the subject. It has been adjusted for its inferior site size, condition, GLA, basement finish, lack of a second patio, lack of an outbuilding, fenced-in yard, and fireplace. Comparable #2 is a recent sale and has been included to demonstrate the marketability of rural properties of a similar quality. It has been adjusted for its site size, age, condition, GLA, walk-out basement, basement finish, lack of a covered porch, lack of an out building, and fireplace. Comparable #3 is an older sale, but has been included to further demonstrate the marketability of rural houses of a similar design. It has been adjusted for its greater site size, access to a private lake, age, condition, bathroom count, GLA, walk-out basement, finished basement  room count, garage space count, lack of an out building, fenced-in yard, and fireplace. Comparable #4 is an active listing and has been included to further demonstrate the marketability of houses in a rural area. It has been adjusted for its location on a busy road, inferior site size, age, condition, bathroom count, bedroom count, GLA, walk-out basement, basement finished room count, garage space count, lack of an out building, and two fireplaces. Comparable #5 is an older sale, but has been included to demonstrate the marketability of rural houses. It has been adjusted for its access to a private lake, age, condition, bathroom count, GLA, walk-out basement, finished basement room count, enclosed deck, lack of an out building, and three fireplaces. Comparable #6 is a older home, but has recently been entirely renovated and features ammenties similar to that of the subject. It has been adjusted for its distance from Bloomington-Normal, superior site size, quality, age, basement size, garage space count, lack of a covered patio, and fireplace. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

All comparables have been found in close proximity or in competing rural areas of McLean County. The comparables include older sales, but have not been given a market time adjustment as they still provide an accurate market value. Comparable #1 is an older sale, but is found in close proximity to the subject property and demonstrates the marketability of rural houses with a similar design and quality of construction. It has been adjusted for its site size, access to a private lake, age, condition, bathroom count, GLA, finished basement room count, garage space count, lack of an out building, fenced-in yard, and fireplace. Comparable #2 is an older sale, but is in close proximity to the subject and has been included to further demonstrate the marketability of rural houses with a similar quality to the subject. It has been adjusted for its site size, access to a private lake, age, condition, bathroom count, GLA, finished basement room count, enclosed deck, lack of an out building, and fireplaces. Comparable #3 is located in the competing rural community of Lexington, IL. It is a recent sale and has been adjusted for its site size, lack of a view of a retention pond, age, condition, bathroom count, GLA, basement size, garage space count, and fireplace count. Comparable #4 is found in the competing rural community of Ellsworth, IL. It has been adjusted for its site size, lack of a view of a retention pond, age, condition, bathroom count, GLA, basement size, out building size, arena and stables, and fireplace. Comparable #5 is found in the competing rural community of Hudson, IL and demonstrates the marketability of houses on a similar site size. It has been adjusted for its site size, lack of a view of a retention pond, age, condition, GLA, basement size, and finished room count. It has been adjusted for its site size, lack of a view of a retention pond, age, bathrom count, condition, GLA, basement size and finished room count, garage space count, and fireplaces. A search was made for comparables of a similar style, quality, and condition to bracket the subject's site size, but none were found. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

All comparables have been found in close proximity to the subject property in Bloomington, IL. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its GLA, lack of a finished basment, and lack of a garden tub. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its finished basement square footage, basement bedroom, and lack of a garden tub. Comparable #3 is a recent sale and has been included to further demonstrate the marketability of similar designed houses in the neighborhood. Based on the sale price/ gross living area being below the subject's, its appears that it has sold for below market value. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, inferior condition, GLA, lack of a basement office, and lack of a garden tub. Comparable #4 is an older sale, but has not been given a market time adjustement as its sale price still represents an accurate market value. It has also been included to bracket the subject's site size and further demonstrate the marketability of houses with a similar design and condition in the neighborhood. It has been adjusted for its greater GLA, lack of a basement office, and backyard patio. After adjustements are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

All comparables have been found in close proximity to the subject property or in competing neighborhoods in Bloomington, IL. All comparables have been applied with an 8.3% market time adjustment based on the sales statistics included in this report. Comparable #1 is a recent sale and has been adjusted for its site size, superior condition, bathroom count, GLA, unfinished basement, garage space count, enclosed porch, and lack of a fence. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, bathroom count, unfinished basement, and garage space count. Comparable #3 is found in a competing neighorhood, but was included to demonstrate the marketability of houses with a similar quality, design, and condition. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, bathroom count, GLA, garage space count, and lack of a fence. Comparable #4 is found in a competing neighborhood, but has been included to demonstrate the marketability of houses with a similar design, quality, and condition. Comparable #4 has been adjusted for its site size, bathroom count, garage space count, and covered porch. Comparable #5 is an older sale, but has been included to further demonstrate the marketability of similar houses within the subject's neighborhood. It has been adjusted for its site size, given a significant condition adjustement due to recent remodeling, bathroom count, GLA, garage space count, and lack of a fence. Comparable #6 is an older sale, but has been included to further demonstrate the marketability of similar houses in the subject's neighborhood and those without a garage. It has been adjusted for its site size, bathroom count, GLA, basement size and finished room count. Comparables #7 & #8 have been included to demonstrate the marketability of similar houses with one-and-a-half bathrooms. They have both been given location adjustments. Comparable #7 has been adjusted for its superior condition, GLA, garage space count, and covered porch. Comparable #8 has been adjusted for its site size, GLA, garage space count, and covered patio. A search was made for comparable properties to bracket the subject's site size, but none were found. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

All comparables have been found in close proximity to the subject property in Normal, IL. Eight comparables have been included to show the marketability of houses similar to the subject in quality and condition, while also demonstrating the stability of the market for houses with similar characteristics to the subject in the last 12 months. The comparables selected include older sales, but they have not been applied with a market time adjustment due to the stability of sale prices in the market area. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its sales concessions,  location on the busy road of Linden St., age, GLA, lack of a finished basement, garage space count, second covered porch, and lack of a fence. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its location on the busy road of Linden St, age, GLA, lack of a basement finish, garage space count, and enclosed porch. Comparable #3 is a different design from the subject, but has been included to demonstrate the marketability of houses in the market area with a similar finished basment. It has been adjusted for its age, GLA, garage space count, and lack of a fenced-in yard.   Comparable #4 is a recent sale and has been included to demonstrate the marketability of similar designed houses in the market area. It has been adjusted for its site size, age, bathroom count, GLA, lack of a finished basement, garage space count, and enclosed porch. Comparable #5 has been adjusted for its site size, age, lack of a finished basement, covered deck, and lack of a fenced-in yard. Comparable #6 is a different design from the subject, but has been included to further demonstrate the marketability of houses with a finished basement similar to the subject property. It has been adjusted for its location on the busy road of Linden St, site size, age, condition, above grade bathroom count, GLA, basement finished room count, and lack of a fenced-in yard.   Comparables #7 & #8 are recent sales and have been included to further demonstrate the marketability of houses with a similar quality and condition in the market area. Comparable #7 has been included due to its similar GLA to the subject. It has been adjusted for its location on Linden St., site size, age, bathroom count, unfinished basement, covered patio, and lack of a fenced-in yard. Comparable #8 has been included to further show the marketability of houses in the subject area with a finished basement. It has been adjusted for its sales concessions, site size, age, bathroom count, GLA, basement finished room count, garage space count, and fireplace count. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

All comparables have been found in competing rural communities in Central Illinois. Due to recent market trends, all comparables have been applied with a 7.3% market time adjusted based on the sales statistics included in this report. All comparables were selected for their similar acreage and ammenties to the subject including barns with stables and other outbuildings. A search was made for comparable properties to bracket the subject's site size, but none were found. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its site size, age, condition, bathroom count, basement room count, garage space count, lack of an enclosed porch, large shed, and lack of a chicken coop. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, age, bathroom count, GLA, lack of a generator, lack of an enclosed porch and deck. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, age, condition due to recent remodeling, bathroom count, GLA, lack of a basement, lack of a generator, lack of an enclosed porch, and fireplace. Due to a lack of recent comparable sales, Comparables #4 and #5 are active listings and have been included to further demonstrate the marketability of rural properties with similar acreage and ammenities. Comparable #4 has been adjusted for its residential location, site size, age, condition, walkout basment, lack of a basement kitchen, lack of outbuilding stables, lack of a shed, and fireplace. Comparable #5 has been adjusted for its site size, condition, bathroom count, GLA, basement room count, lack of a generator, lack of an enclosed porch, horse barn size, shed count, fireplace, and fence. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.   Conditions on Appraisal  "appraiser to address conditions on FNMA SSR due to 4.3 score"  The 4.3 score reflects the lack of recent comparable sales near the subject property, primarily due to its rural location. The selected comparable properties share similar amenities, quality, and condition with the subject property. After making the necessary adjustments, these comparable properties provide an accurate estimate of the property's value.

All comparables have been found in close proximity to the subject property. All comparables have been applied with a market time adjustment of 7.2% based on the sales statistics document included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its site size, given a quality adjustment for its all brick contruction, lack of basement finish, heating/cooling systems, garage space count, lack of a fireplace, and lack of a fence. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, given a quality adjustment for its all brick contruction, GLA, basement finished room count, and heating/cooling system. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its location on the corner of Whites Pl and Emerson St, site size, GLA, basement finished room count, heating/cooling systems, garage space count, and patio. Comparable #4 has been included to further demonstrate the marketability of houses with a similar age and design. It has been adjusted for its location, site size, condition due to recent renovations, above grade bathroom count, GLA, basement finished room count, heating/cooling systems, and lack of a fireplace. A search was made for comparable sales to bracket the subject's site size and with similar heating/cooling systems, but none were located. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

All comparables are found in close proximity to the subject property in Normal, IL. Comparable #5 has been adjusted for its site size, basement finished room count, and deck. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

Due to a lack of recent comparable sales all comparables were found in close proximity to the subject property or in a competing neighborhood. All comparables were applied with a 5.2% market time adjustment based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its basement finished room count. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, and lack of a finished basement. Comparable #3 is a detatched ranch in the subject's neighborhood and has been included to demonstrate the marketability of homes with a similar room count and condition in close proximity to the subject property. It appears to have sold below market value, but has been included to demonstrate the marketability of attached homes of a similar design, condition, and quality in close proximity to the subject property. Due to it appearing to sell below market value, the least amount of weight has been applied to Comparable #5. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

All comparables have been found in close proximity to the subject property in Bloomington, IL. The comparables were selected to demonstrate the marketability of houses in the Founder's Grove neighborhood of Bloomington, IL with similar GLA, condition, and amenities to the subject. A search was made for comparable properties to bracket the subject's site size, but due to the subject's larger site size than most properties in the market area none were found. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its site size, brick construction, bathroom count, GLA, main floor bedroom, garage space count, lack of an enclosed porch, and lack of whirlpool tub. Comparable #1 features a finished detatched studio that was used by the previous owner as an art studio. This aspect of the comparable was not given an adjustment as the utilitity is similar in value to that of the large detatched garage/workshop in the subject's backyard. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, brick construction, bathroom count, GLA, basement bathroom, garage space count, lack of a whirpool tub, lack of a detatched workshop, and fenced-in yard. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, bathroom count, GLA, basement bathroom, main floor bedroom, garage space count, enclosed porch count, lack of a whirlpool tub, lack of a detatched workshop, and fenced-in yard. Comparable #4 has been included to further demonstrate the marketability of houses of a similar condition and GLA in Founder's Grove. It has been adjusted for its site size, brick construction, bathroom count, basment finished room count, garage space count, and lack of a detatched workshop. Comparable #5 has been included to bracket the subject's GLA. Comparable #5 has been adjusted for its site size, bathroom count, GLA, finished attic, garage space count, lack of a detatched workshop, and fenced-in yard. Although it is an older sale, it has not been given a market time adjustment due to stability of sale prices in the market area. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

Due to a lack of recent comparable sales in Hudson, IL and around Lake Bloomington the comparables are found in close proximity to the subject or in competing rural communities in Central Illinois. The comparables were selected to demonstrate the marketability of houses with a similar quality and condition to the subject. Comparable #1 is a recent sale found in the same neighborhood as the subject. It was given significant adjustments for its dissimilar characteristics to the subject, but was included as it demonstrates the marketability of houses within the Hickory Heights neighborhood. It was adjusted for its site size, view, age, bathroom count, GLA, basement and basement finished room count, garage space count, lack of an enclosed porch, and two sheds. Comparable #2 has been included due to the recency of its sale, location, quality, design, and condition. It has been adjusted for its site size, view, basement, lack of an enclosed porch, lack of a fence, and shed. Comparable #3 was included to further demonstrate the marketability of houses of a similar design, quality, and condition in a competing rural community. It has been adjusted for its site size, view,  GLA, basement, solar panels, garage space count, and lack of an enclosed porch.   An extensive search was made to find comparable sales within close proximity to the subject property that are situated on a body of water with a similar utility as the subject's. Comparable #4 was chosen to demonstrate the marketability of houses situated on a similar sized body of water in a rural community. It has recieved signifcant adjustments to rectify dissimilarities between it and the subject. It has been adjusted for its site size, partial brick construction, bathroom count, GLA, walkout basement, basement finished room count, garage space count, and lack of a fenced-in yard. Comparable #5 was included to further demonstrate the marketability of houses of a similar quality, condition, and design, in the market area. It has been adjusted for its view, condition due to recent updates, bathroom count, GLA, basement, lack of an enclosed porch, lack of a fence, and a shed. All comparables besides Comp #1 were not given an age adjustment due recent updates resulting in their effective ages being similar to the subject property. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

All comparables have been found in either close proximity to the subject property or in competing neighborhoods in Forsyth, IL. The comparables were selected to demonstrate the marketability of houses with a similar design, age, condition, quality, and room count to the subject. Due to recent market trends in Forsyth, IL a market time adjustment of 4% was applied to the comparables based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its site size, condition due to recent updates, GLA, and basement finished room count. Comparables #2 & #3 are located in a competing neighborhood, but have been included because they demonstrate the marketability of houses in the market area with a similar design, age, quality, condition, and room count. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, walkout basement, basement finished room count, garage space count, deck size, and fenced-in yard. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, walkout basement, and fireplace count. A search was made for comparable properties in the market area with a similar design, age, condition, and quality to bracket the subject's contract price, but none were found. Based on the comparables' sale price per GLA, it appears that the subject has sold  below market value and that the market is willing to pay at least $175/sqft for a house of a similar design, quality, and condition. Due to the limited adjustments made most weight has been placed on Comparables #1 & #3. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.   Underwriter Conditions  Appraiser to correct placing of the legal description.  - The legal description has been reformatted to fix placing errors during file conversion. Sorry for the inconvenience.   Appraiser to address SSR findings- Comp #2- The reported total basement area is materially different than what has been reported by other appraisers please confirm report is accurate.  - Comparable #2 reported total basement area is supported by the building characteristics information found in public record and cross referenced with information avaliable on the MLS listing #11878419. The total basement area reported was deemed to be accurate based on the information avaliable to the appraiser at the time of the report.   Comp #3- The quality rating is materially different than what has been reported by other appraisers, please confirm report is accurate.  - Comparable #3 quality rating was based on the dwelling's partial brick construction and interior finish. This was deemed to most accurately fit the Q3 definition of "Dwellings with this quality rating are residences of higher quality built from individual or readily available designer plans in above-standard residential tract developments or on an individual property owner's site. The design includes significant exterior ornamentation and interiors that are well finished. The workmanship exceeds acceptable standards and many materials and finishes throughout the dwelling have been upgraded from "stock" standards." The Q3 rating based on these characteristics of the property is consistent with the other reported comparables and subject quality ratings.

Due to a lack of recent comparable sales in close proximity to the subject, an extensive search was made to identify comparable sales that demonstrate the marketability of houses with a similar age, design, condition, and GLA to the subject. Due to the subject's close proximity to the border of Bloomington and Normal, comparables located in Normal, IL that were deemed to be similar to the subject have been included but adjusted to account for the difference in location. Due to recent stability in sale prices in the market area, the comparables have not been applied with a market time adjustment. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its site size, quality, age, condition due to recent remodeling, bathroom count, GLA, basement finished room count, garage space, and deck. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its quality, condiiton due to recent remodeling, bathroom count, basement finished room count, garage space, deck, and lack of a fence. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its sales concessions, location, bathroom count, GLA, basement finished room count, garage space count, patio, and fenced-in yard. Comparable #4 has been included to bracket the subject's GLA. It has been adjusted for its location, quality, GLA, lack of a basement, garage space count, and patio. Comparable #5 has been adjusted for its location, site size, age, bathroom count, basement finished room count, garage space count, enclosed porch, deck, and patio. Comparable #6 is an older sale, but has been included to further demonstrate the marketability of houses with a similar design in a similar location. It has been adjusted for its site size, quality, age, condition, bathroom count, GLA, basement finished room count, garage space count, patio, and deck. The condition adjustment applied to Comparable #6 is less than that of Comparables #1 & #2 to account for the recency of their remodeling. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

Due to a lack of recent comparable sales within McLean, IL, the search was expanded to include other competing rural communities. Additionally, it was necessary to analyze sales occurring up to 18 months prior to the effective date to identify sales that reflect market support for the premium paid for dwellings of similar GLA, quality, and condition within the subject's market area. The comparables were selected to demonstrate the marketability of houses with a similar location, design, age, and condition as the subject. Due to recent market trends the comparables were applied with a market time adjustment of 7.0% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. The subject property is of superior quality and condition relative to typical ranch-style dwellings in the McLean, IL market area. Market participants seeking ranch homes in this area demonstrate a willingness to pay a premium for properties that reflect similar quality and condition. The subject's finished basement is of above-average quality and contributes additional value, as this level of finish is supported by comparable sales and recognized by buyers in the market. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its site size, quality, age, bathroom count, GLA, lack of a basement, and lack of a shed. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, view, quality, age, bathroom count, and deck count. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, view, bathroom count, basement finished room count, deck, patio, and lack of a fence. Comparable #4 has been adjusted for its site size, quality, bathroom count, GLA, lack of a basement, and garage space count. Comparable #5 has been adjusted for its site size, quality, age, bathroom count, GLA, basement finished room count, lack of a fence, and lack of a shed. Comparable #6 has been adjusted for its sales concessions, site size, view, quality, age, GLA, and basement finished room count. Comparable #7 has been included to bracket the subject's site size and bedroom count. It has been adjusted for its site size, quality, condition, garage space count, and lack of a shed. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.

Due to a lack of recent comparable sales in the subject's immediate market area, an extensive search was made to find recent comparable sales in competing rural areas that would appeal to a similar market segment as the subject. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a market time adjustment of 4.2% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its condition, bathroom count, GLA, basement finished room count, garage space count, lack of an enclosed porch, fireplace count, outbuilding, and accessory dwelling unit. The sqft, quality, and condition of the ADU of Comparable #1 was considered and a significant adjustment was made to account for its contributory value. However, an ADU is atypical for properties in a rural location and did not appear to have a significant impact on the marketability of Comparable #1. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its sales concessions, site size, quality, age, bathroom count, GLA, lack of a basement, heating/cooling system, lack of an enclosed porch, lack of a fireplace, and outbuilding. Comparable #6 has been adjusted for its age, bathroom count, GLA, basement finished room count, heating/cooling system, garage space count, fireplace count, and quonset shed. Comparable #7 has been included to bracket the subject's age. It has been adjusted for its site size, age, bathroom count, GLA, lack of a main floor bedroom, heating/cooling system, garage space count, fireplace count, outbuilding, and fence. Comparable #7's reported GLA on public record does not include the finished attic area currently utilized as a bedroom. 301 Ireland Grove Rd, Bloomington, IL  was considered to bracket the subject's above grade bathroom count, but was deemed to be an uncomparable recent sale. An extenstive search was made to find a recent comparable sale to bracket the subject's GLA, but none were identified. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of value.
